summary: Russian forces conducted a combined drone and missile strike on Kiev, Dnipro, Kharkiv and Zaporizhzhia, igniting a Ukroboronprom building in Kiev. Simultaneously, multiple UAV attacks hit infrastructure in the Krasnodar, Bryansk, Kursk and Belgorod regions, causing civilian injuries and fires. Ukrainian forces reported limited advances on the Sumy and Kharkiv fronts while facing intensified UAV pressure.
key_points: Russian combined drone and missile strike hit Kiev, Dnipro, Kharkiv and Zaporizhzhia, setting a Ukroboronprom building on fire (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
UAV attack caused a fire at the Ilskoy refinery in Krasnodar region and debris fell on a multi‑storey building in Slavyansk‑on‑Kuban (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Civilian casualties from UAV strikes reported in Bryansk (two women injured), Kursk (one civilian killed) and Belgorod regions (multiple injuries) (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Ukrainian forces advanced up to 500 m in several sectors of the Sumy direction, engaging in firefights near Bachivsk, Ivolzhansky and Pisarevsky (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
In the Kharkiv direction, Russian “North” Group units advanced toward Kachiy Lopan’ and Okhrikovka, with three AFU soldiers surrendering (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Ukrainian defense industry facilities in Khmelnytskyi region were set on fire after Russian attacks (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30611).
Groups of UAVs were reported moving from the south toward Krivoy Rog, Zaporizhzhia and Snigurivka (Source: @kpszsu/63715, @kpszsu/63725).

sections.executive_summary: Russian combined drone‑missile strike ignited a Ukroboronprom building in Kiev and hit multiple cities. Ukrainian forces made modest gains on the Sumy and Kharkiv fronts amid intensified UAV attacks on Russian‑held territory. Civilian casualties and infrastructure damage continued across several regions.

points: Ukrainian defense industry enterprises in the Khmelnytskyi region were set ablaze following Russian attacks, indicating targeting of industrial capacity (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30611).
Ukrainian forces reported advancing up to 500 meters in the Sumy direction, securing sections near Bachivsk, Ivolzhansky and Pisarevsky and engaging in firefights (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).

In the Kharkiv sector, assault units of the Russian "North" Group moved toward the logistics hub Kachiy Lopan' and Okhrikovka, with three Ukrainian soldiers surrendering (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Ukrainian officials warned of a possible massive strike that night, urging the public to heed alerts (Source: @UkraineNow/81634).
Russian forces executed a coordinated strike using drones and missiles on Kiev, Dnipro, Kharkiv and Zaporizhzhia, causing a fire at a Ukroboronprom building in Kiev (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
UAV attacks in the Krasnodar region ignited a fire at the Ilskoy refinery and dropped debris on a multi‑storey building in Slavyansk‑on‑Kuban (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
In the Kursk region, a civilian car was hit by a drone in Shchekino, killing a civilian, and additional drone incidents injured several people in nearby villages (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Belgorod region experienced multiple UAV strikes on roads, vehicles and settlements, resulting in injuries to civilians and damage to infrastructure (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).

Ukrainian forces reported limited advances in the Sumy direction, gaining up to 500 m in several sectors and engaging Russian units near Bachivsk, Ivolzhansky and Pisarevsky (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Russian "North" Group units continued offensive actions toward Kachiy Lopan' and Okhrikovka on the Kharkiv front, with three Ukrainian soldiers surrendering (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
UAV groups from the north‑east were observed launching, with approximately six groups reported from that direction (Source: @eRadarrua/95085).
New UAV groups from Kursk region crossed into the Sumy area, heading toward Ternev (Source: @kpszsu/63727).
A six‑year‑old girl was injured in Bryansk region when UAV debris fell in a residential yard (Source: @tass_agency/378698).
In Bryansk, a civilian car was struck by a drone in Shchekino, resulting in a civilian death (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Ukrainian forces attacked an FPV drone on a pig farm in Klimovsky district, injuring a worker (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Two women were injured by a FPV drone in Andreykovichi, Pogarsky district (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
UAV groups from the south were reported moving toward Krivoy Rog and Zaporizhzhia (Source: @kpszsu/63715, @kpszsu/63713).
A UAV group from the south headed toward Snigurivka in Mykolaiv region (Source: @kpszsu/63725).
UAV attacks in the Krasnodar region caused a fire at the Ilskoy refinery (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
UAV debris fell on a multi‑storey building in Slavyansk‑on‑Kuban, causing damage (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Russian forces employed combined drone and missile strikes on major Ukrainian cities, including a hit on a Ukroboronprom building in Kiev (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Ukrainian forces launched guided aviation bombs on Sumy and Donetsk regions (Source: @kpszsu/63690).
Multiple UAV groups were observed launching from north‑east, south‑east and southern directions, indicating a broad aerial pressure (Source: @eRadarrua/95085, @kpszsu/63713, @kpszsu/63725).
Civilian casualties from UAV attacks were reported across Bryansk, Kursk and Belgorod regions, highlighting the impact on non‑military targets (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).

key_developments: Russian combined drone‑missile strike ignited a Ukroboronprom building in Kiev and hit Dnipro, Kharkiv and Zaporizhzhia (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
UAV attack caused a fire at the Ilskoy refinery in Krasnodar region and debris fell on a building in Slavyansk‑on‑Kuban (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Civilian casualties from UAV strikes occurred in Bryansk (two women injured), Kursk (one civilian killed) and Belgorod (multiple injuries) (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Ukrainian forces advanced up to 500 m in the Sumy direction, securing sections near Bachivsk, Ivolzhansky and Pisarevsky (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Russian "North" Group units advanced toward Kachiy Lopan' and Okhrikovka on the Kharkiv front, with three Ukrainian soldiers surrendering (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30605).
Ukrainian defense industry facilities in Khmelnytskyi region were set on fire after Russian attacks (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30611).
Multiple UAV groups were reported moving from the south toward Krivoy Rog, Zaporizhzhia and Snigurivka (Source: @kpszsu/63715, @kpszsu/63725).
sections.threat_assessment: Russian UAV and missile operations continue to target both strategic infrastructure and civilian areas across multiple fronts, increasing pressure on Ukrainian defenses. Ukrainian advances remain limited to small territorial gains, while Russian forces consolidate positions around key logistics hubs. The proliferation of UAV groups from several directions suggests a sustained aerial campaign that could strain Ukrainian air defense resources.
sections.regional_response: Local authorities in affected Russian regions reported civilian injuries and infrastructure damage, prompting emergency responses and limited evacuations. Ukrainian officials warned of potential massive strikes and urged public vigilance, indicating heightened alert levels in major cities. International observers have noted the escalation but specific diplomatic actions were not detailed in the source material.
sections.intelligence_notes: The concentration of UAV launches from north‑east, south‑east and southern axes points to coordinated Russian aerial tactics aimed at overwhelming Ukrainian air defenses. Fires at industrial sites such as the Ilskoy refinery may be intended to disrupt energy supplies. Continued Ukrainian small‑scale advances suggest a focus on probing Russian lines rather than large‑scale offensives at this stage.
